ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the route */,
  "route_long_name" TEXT /* Long name of the route */,
  "route_desc" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" INTEGER /* Type of the route (e.g., 3 for bus, 2 for rail) */,
  "route_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the route */,
  "route_color" TEXT /* Color code for the route on maps and visualizations */,
  "route_text_color" TEXT /* Text color for the route on maps and visualizations */,
  "route_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the route (e.g., Northbound, Southbound) */,
  "route_frequency" TEXT /* Typical frequency of the route (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "route_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of vehicles on the route */,
  "route_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the route data */,
  "route_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each service schedule */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service schedule */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service schedule */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service schedule */,
  "service_days" TEXT /* Days of the week the service is active (e.g., '1111100' for Monday to Friday) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service schedule */,
  "service_frequency" TEXT /* Typical frequency of service (e.g., every 30 minutes) */,
  "service_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of vehicles during the service */,
  "service_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the service data */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "service_id" TEXT /* ID of the service schedule the trip belongs to */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the trip follows */,
  "trip_headsign" TEXT /* Headsign or destination of the trip */,
  "trip_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the trip */,
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Direction of the trip (0 for outbound, 1 for inbound) */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trip is part of */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape the trip follows */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of the trip (e.g., regular, express) */,
  "bikes_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of bikes allowed on the trip */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Wheelchair accessibility of the trip (0 for not accessible, 1 for accessible) */,
  "trip_start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the trip */,
  "trip_end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the trip */,
  "trip_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the trip */,
  "trip_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the trip data */,
  "trip_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trip */,
  "trip_real_time_status" TEXT /* Real-time status of the trip (e.g., on schedule, delayed) */,
  "trip_real_time_capacity" INTEGER /* Real-time capacity of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_pt_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the shape point */,
  "shape_pt_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the shape point */,
  "shape_pt_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the shape point */,
  "shape_dist_traveled" REAL /* Cumulative distance traveled along the shape up to this point */,
  "shape_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the shape data */,
  "shape_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id", "shape_pt_sequence")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "block_start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the block */,
  "block_end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the block */,
  "block_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the block */,
  "block_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the block data */,
  "block_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stop_times" (
  "stop_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop time */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the stop time belongs to */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time from the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop in the trip */,
  "stop_headsign" TEXT /* Headsign or destination at the stop */,
  "pickup_type" INTEGER /* Pickup type (0 for regular, 1 for no pickup) */,
  "drop_off_type" INTEGER /* Drop-off type (0 for regular, 1 for no drop-off) */,
  "shape_dist_traveled" REAL /* Cumulative distance traveled along the trip up to this stop */,
  "stop_time_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the stop time data */,
  "stop_time_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stop time */,
  "stop_time_real_time_status" TEXT /* Real-time status of the stop time (e.g., on schedule, delayed) */,
  "stop_time_real_time_capacity" INTEGER /* Real-time capacity at the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stop_times_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_code" TEXT /* Code of the stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "stop_desc" TEXT /* Description of the stop */,
  "stop_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "stop_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "zone_id" TEXT /* Zone ID for fare calculation */,
  "stop_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the stop */,
  "location_type" INTEGER /* Location type (0 for stop, 1 for station) */,
  "parent_station" TEXT /* ID of the parent station (if applicable) */,
  "stop_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the stop data */,
  "stop_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stop */,
  "stop_real_time_status" TEXT /* Real-time status of the stop (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "stop_real_time_capacity" INTEGER /* Real-time capacity at the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the frequency belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the frequency period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the frequency period */,
  "headway_secs" INTEGER /* Headway in seconds (time between consecutive trips) */,
  "exact_times" INTEGER /* Exact times indicator (0 for approximate, 1 for exact) */,
  "frequency_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the frequency data */,
  "frequency_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequencies_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_dates" (
  "service_id" TEXT /* ID of the service schedule */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the service exception */,
  "exception_type" INTEGER /* Exception type (1 for added service, 2 for removed service) */,
  "service_exception_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the service exception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, scheduler, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., trip_id, stop_id) */,
  "access_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the access log */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
